channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-01 04:15 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink Direct to Cell is now available in the UK and will provide data with voice, video and messa...
item.description: Starlink Direct to Cell is now available in the UK and will provide data with voice, video and messaging to customers in areas with no terrestrial service

item.title: @elonmusk: Had a great time hosting@MarshaBlackburnand@SenBrentTaylortoday at MACROHARD. We showed them how@xai...
item.description: Had a great time hosting@MarshaBlackburnand@SenBrentTaylortoday at MACROHARD. We showed them how@xaiis keeping utility costs down for the community while building the world's largest AI supercomputer. We appreciate their support.

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX Starbase just dropped the coolest parade float Brownsville has ever seen, a glowing rocket wi...
item.description: SpaceX Starbase just dropped the coolest parade float Brownsville has ever seen, a glowing rocket with the full SPACEX logo lighting up the night during Charro Days. Fifth year running and it's awesome.

item.title: @elonmusk: Because I think we need to have immigration law and deport illegal aliens? There was an election, an...
item.description: Because I think we need to have immigration law and deport illegal aliens? There was an election, and this was a core issue people voted on It's cringe as fuck seeing the privileged class of infulencers virtue signaling for something they never experience the consequences from

item.title: @elonmusk: 𝕏 just officially launched the For You timeline filter that allows you to only see posts about topic...
item.description: 𝕏 just officially launched the For You timeline filter that allows you to only see posts about topics that you are interested in. You can select multiple topics. Tap the drop down menu button on “For You” at the top of your timeline to access it.

item.title: @elonmusk: You can now select topics for your timeline, so if you’re tired of political ragebait, you can selec...
item.description: You can now select topics for your timeline, so if you’re tired of political ragebait, you can select something else 😂 Just tap on For You.

item.title: @elonmusk: Prediction of the future is the best measure of intelligence
item.description: Prediction of the future is the best measure of intelligence

item.title: @elonmusk: If you’d like to see less politics or crypto, just select all except those ones. This is an “early a...
item.description: If you’d like to see less politics or crypto, just select all except those ones. This is an “early access” feature, so expect it to improve rapidly.

item.title: @elonmusk: First flight with starlink, this is so nice
item.description: First flight with starlink, this is so nice

item.title: @elonmusk: Reminder to respect Twitter’s transition. It’s 𝕏 now. Hope this helps.
item.description: Reminder to respect Twitter’s transition. It’s 𝕏 now. Hope this helps.

item.title: @elonmusk: In March, for the first time,@SpaceXwill surpass 10,000 Starlink satellites in orbit. 🔥@Starlinksate...
item.description: In March, for the first time,@SpaceXwill surpass 10,000 Starlink satellites in orbit. 🔥@Starlinksatellites deployment & constellation update (as of Feb. 28) • 2026: 567 • 2019-2026: 11,357 • In orbit: 9,826 • Active: 8,352

item.title: @elonmusk: When asked the simple, direct question: “Would you allow biological males to compete in women’s spor...
item.description: When asked the simple, direct question: “Would you allow biological males to compete in women’s sports?” ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude dodged the question with essays on “inclusion” and “individual rights” and couldn’t answer the biological reality Only Grok gave the honest answer: No Biology is not bigotry. The other AIs are so infected by the woke mind virus they can’t state basic facts Grok remains the only one willing to tell the truth

item.title: @elonmusk: Bill Gates told Elon Musk that these were impossible. Can’t wait to see next-gen Tesla Semis everywh...
item.description: Bill Gates told Elon Musk that these were impossible. Can’t wait to see next-gen Tesla Semis everywhere. 😎

item.title: @elonmusk: grok vs claude on Iran realtime information is valuable
item.description: grok vs claude on Iran realtime information is valuable

item.title: @elonmusk: this is insanity: > Trump neutralized two major dictators in less than 24hrs total combat time and 0...
item.description: this is insanity: > Trump neutralized two major dictators in less than 24hrs total combat time and 0 American casualties > by contrast,@LeaderJohnThunehas failed for months to pass a voter id bill supported by 84% of Americans > the only thing he has to do is require debate instead of a silent filibuster the gap in skill, patriotism and political willpower is almost too wide to comprehend
